_comment: GIRA hook wiring for Gemini CLI. Event names are Gemini's (SessionStart, BeforeAgent, BeforeTool, AfterTool, PreCompress, SessionEnd). There is no Stop-veto event, so IRA's Ralph completion-loop is NOT enforceable here — ralph degrades to guidance. ${extensionPath} is substituted by Gemini CLI; the install script rewrites it to an absolute path for the Antigravity variant.

hooks.name: gira-context-loader
hooks.description: Load GIRA state, active modes, and project memory at session start

hooks.name: gira-recall
hooks.description: Project-scoped semantic recall from ira-memory (:7775, X-Cwd boost)

hooks.name: gira-keyword-detector
hooks.description: Detect skill keywords and classify complexity

hooks.name: gira-state-sync
hooks.description: Track ISC progress on file edits

hooks.name: gira-context-saver
hooks.description: Save ISC progress and mode state before context compression

hooks.name: gira-session-capture
hooks.description: Log the session conversation to ira-memory (:7775)
